about.title: About Ludus
about.what_body: Ludus is a self-hostable, privacy-first platform for simple multiplayer turn-based games. No sign-up, no tracking, no persistent user data — just start a game and share a link.
about.privacy_body: Ludus is designed so that nothing about you is stored beyond what the game itself needs.
privacy_points: No IP addresses are stored by the application. A reverse proxy in front of Ludus may log that a connection was made, but Ludus itself never records or processes IP addresses.
Game sessions are stored temporarily in memory and expire automatically — once a session is gone, there is no trace.
Usernames are chosen per game and are never tied to any permanent identity.
about.token_body: When you first open Ludus, a random unique token is generated and saved in your browser's local storage. This token is your only identity on the platform.
token_points: The token is a random UUID — it contains no personal information.
It is sent to the server only to associate you with your game sessions.
It is never shared with other players or visible outside your own browser.
No cookies are used — the token lives only in your browser's local storage.
If you clear your browser storage, the token is gone and your games will no longer be visible on that device.
You can export your token as a QR code or text and import it on another device to continue your games — tap "My Token" in the top bar.
about.selfhost_body: Ludus is open source and designed to be self-hosted. You can run your own instance for your friends or family. The source code and setup instructions are available on GitHub:

token_import.prompt: Import token {token}? This replaces your current device identity.

lobby.title: My Games
lobby.no_active: No active games. Start one below!
lobby.stats_in_progress: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} in progress
lobby.stats_total: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} played all time

create.title: Start a new game
create.public_label: Public game — anyone on this server can join

game_room.waiting_title: Waiting for another player to join.
game_room.share_text: Join me for a game of {game}!
game_room.forfeit_confirm: This will end the game and give the win to your opponent. Are you sure?

token_manager.title: Player Token
token_manager.description: Your token identifies your games on this device. Export it to continue on another device — no account needed.
token_manager.qr_hint: Scan on another device to import automatically
token_manager.import_label: Import a token from another device
token_manager.warning: This will replace your current token. Games on this device will no longer be visible unless you re-import the original token.
